title: Disc Tissue RNA Extraction
author: Joesph B Lesnak
materials: If in RNAlater place in 4°C refrigerator overnight
Discard the flow through and collection tube.

steps.title: Isolate nucleus pulposus (NP) and annulus...
steps.instruction: Isolate nucleus pulposus (NP) and annulus fibrosus (AF) tissue and freeze immediately in powdered dry ice or place in 5ml tube with 4ml of RNAlater

steps.title: Next day remove tissue from RNAlater...
steps.instruction: Next day remove tissue from RNAlater and freeze in powdered dry ice

steps.title: Place in new tube and store in -80°C
steps.instruction: Place in new tube and store in -80°C

steps.title: Remove tissue, cut off a section,...
steps.instruction: Remove tissue, cut off a section, and place in a 1.5 mL tube on dry ice. Measure the weight of each tissue.

steps.title: Less than 100mg, the smaller the...
steps.instruction: Less than 100mg, the smaller the better, especially for AF samples

steps.title: Prechill tubes to try and keep...
steps.instruction: Prechill tubes to try and keep tissue as frozen as possible

steps.title: Place tissue pieces in Corvaris TT2...
steps.instruction: Place tissue pieces in Corvaris TT2 bag and leave on dry ice till ready to pulverize

steps.title: Dip bag into liquid nitrogen and...
steps.instruction: Dip bag into liquid nitrogen and impact with Corvaris until powder is formed

steps.title: It is important to move frozen...
steps.instruction: It is important to move frozen debris around after each impact to thoroughly pulverize

steps.title: Add 1 mL Qiazol to bag...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL Qiazol to bag to retrieve frozen, pulverized samples, and place back in 1.5ml tube

steps.title: Add 200 uL of chloroform to each tube
steps.instruction: Add 200 uL of chloroform to each tube

steps.title: Shake for 15 seconds and let...
steps.instruction: Shake for 15 seconds and let incubate for 2 minutes at room temp.

steps.title: Centrifuge at 4°C 12,000 g, 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 4°C 12,000 g, 10 minutes

steps.title: Collect upper aqueous phase
steps.instruction: Collect upper aqueous phase. Transfer it to a new microfuge tube.

steps.title: Add again 200 uL of chloroform...
steps.instruction: Add again 200 uL of chloroform to aqueous phase, shake, incubate, and centrifuge.

steps.title: Collect upper aqueous phase
steps.instruction: Collect upper aqueous phase. Transfer it to a new microfuge tube.

steps.title: Add again 200 uL of chloroform...
steps.instruction: Add again 200 uL of chloroform to aqueous phase, shake, incubate, and centrifuge.

steps.title: Collect upper aqueous phase
steps.instruction: Collect upper aqueous phase. Transfer it to a new microfuge tube.

steps.title: Add same volume of 70% RNAse free ethanol (~300-400 uL)
steps.instruction: Add same volume of 70% RNAse free ethanol (~300-400 uL).

steps.title: Mix gently
steps.instruction: Mix gently.

steps.title: Load 700 uL of sample onto RNeasy spin column
steps.instruction: Load 700 uL of sample onto RNeasy spin column

steps.title: Centrifuge 15 sec >8,000 g at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 15 sec >8,000 g at room temperature.

steps.title: Repeat until loading until the whole...
steps.instruction: Repeat until loading until the whole sample has gone through the column.

steps.title: Add 350 uL Buffer RW1 to the RNeasy spin column
steps.instruction: Add 350 uL Buffer RW1 to the RNeasy spin column.

steps.title: Centrifuge 15sec >8,000 g at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 15sec >8,000 g at room temperature.

steps.title: Perform DNAase clean up step
steps.instruction: Perform DNAase clean up step

steps.title: Add 70 ul of buffer RDD...
steps.instruction: Add 70 ul of buffer RDD (fridge) to aliquots of Qiagen DNAse (10 ul) (-20°C)

steps.title: Add the total volume from tube...
steps.instruction: Add the total volume from tube (80 ul) directly on to column

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 15 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 15 minutes

steps.title: Add 350 uL Buffer RW1 to the RNeasy spin column
steps.instruction: Add 350 uL Buffer RW1 to the RNeasy spin column.

steps.title: Centrifuge 15sec >8,000 g at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 15sec >8,000 g at room temperature.

steps.title: Perform DNAase clean up step a second time
steps.instruction: Perform DNAase clean up step a second time

steps.title: Add 70 ul of buffer RDD...
steps.instruction: Add 70 ul of buffer RDD (fridge) to aliquots of Qiagen DNAse (10 ul) (-20°C)

steps.title: Add the total volume from tube...
steps.instruction: Add the total volume from tube (80 ul) directly on to column

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 15 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 15 minutes

steps.title: Add 350 uL Buffer RW1 to the RNeasy spin column
steps.instruction: Add 350 uL Buffer RW1 to the RNeasy spin column.

steps.title: Centrifuge 15sec >8,000 g at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 15sec >8,000 g at room temperature.

steps.title: Pipette 500 uL Buffer RPE onto the RNeasy spin column
steps.instruction: Pipette 500 uL Buffer RPE onto the RNeasy spin column.

steps.title: Centrifuge 15sec >8,000 g at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 15sec >8,000 g at room temperature.

steps.title: Pipette 500 uL Buffer RPE onto the RNeasy spin column
steps.instruction: Pipette 500 uL Buffer RPE onto the RNeasy spin column.

steps.title: Centrifuge 2 min > 8,000 rpm at room temperature
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 2 min > 8,000 rpm at room temperature.

steps.title: Transfer RNeasy column to new 2mL collection tube
steps.instruction: Transfer RNeasy column to new 2mL collection tube

steps.title: Centrifuge for 1 minute to dry...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge for 1 minute to dry collection tube at full speed (16,000g) at room temperature.

steps.title: Transfer the RNeasy column to 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the RNeasy column to 1.5 mL collection tube

steps.title: Pipette 15 uL RNase-free water; incubate 1 minute
steps.instruction: Pipette 15 uL RNase-free water; incubate 1 minute.

steps.title: Centrifuge RNeasy column > 8,000 g,...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge RNeasy column > 8,000 g, at room temperature for 15 seconds.

steps.title: Pipette the same 15 uL RNase-free...
steps.instruction: Pipette the same 15 uL RNase-free water in collection tube back onto column; incubate 1 minute.

steps.title: Centrifuge RNeasy column > 8,000 g...
steps.instruction: Centrifuge RNeasy column > 8,000 g at room temperature for 1 minute.

steps.title: Measure RNA concentration with Qubit
steps.instruction: Measure RNA concentration with Qubit

steps.title: Prep working reagent i
steps.instruction: Prep working reagent i. 200 ul per tube ii. 1 tube for each sample iii. 2 tubes for standards iv. 200x stock solution at room temperature v. Rest of contents should be at 4°C vi. Need to use on Qubit tubes

steps.title: Prep standards i
steps.instruction: Prep standards i. 10 ul of low standard + 190 ul working reagent ii. 10 ul of high standard + 190 ul working reagent

steps.title: Prep samples i
steps.instruction: Prep samples i. 1-5 ul of sample + 199-195 ul of working reagent

steps.title: Vortex and read samples on Qubit machine
steps.instruction: Vortex and read samples on Qubit machine
